## Description
Provide a concise summary of the architectural impact or feature domain additions.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Code cleanup / Refactoring (non-functional changes)

## Database Migrations
- [ ] This PR contains new migrations and needs `prisma migrate deploy`
- [ ] No DB changes

## Verification Checklist
- [ ] Strict type checking passes (`npm run build` or `tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Linters and formatters passed (`npm run lint` / `npm run format`)
- [ ] Local tests executed successfully
